name: Goldman Sachs
recruiting_profile: Recruits heavily from top 15 target schools with a highly structured summer analyst program serving as the primary pipeline to full-time offers. Applications typically open in late July/August for the following summer, with first-round interviews conducted on campus and via HireVue.

name: JPMorgan Chase
recruiting_profile: One of the largest recruiters on campus at target and semi-target schools, running multiple summer analyst programs across divisions. Applications open in August with extensive use of Pymetrics assessments and HireVue video interviews in early rounds.

name: Morgan Stanley
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a core set of 20+ target schools with a well-regarded summer analyst program across all major divisions. Applications open in August, and the firm places strong emphasis on networking and informational interviews prior to formal applications.

name: Bank of America
recruiting_profile: Runs a large-scale campus recruiting program across target and semi-target schools, with summer analyst cohorts in IB, S&T, and capital markets. Applications open in August with a multi-step process including online assessments and Superday interviews.

name: Citigroup
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a broad set of target and semi-target schools globally, with summer analyst programs across ICG divisions. Applications open in August, and the firm is known for being relatively more accessible compared to other bulge brackets for non-target candidates.

name: Evercore
recruiting_profile: Highly selective recruiting from top 10-15 target schools with a lean summer analyst class known for exceptional deal exposure. Applications open in August, and networking with current analysts is considered critical to securing an interview.

name: Lazard
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools with a strong emphasis on restructuring and M&A advisory experience. Summer analyst classes are small and highly competitive, with applications opening in August and a heavy focus on technical interview preparation.

name: Moelis & Company
recruiting_profile: Small, highly selective summer analyst program recruiting primarily from top 10 target schools. Known for intense deal exposure and lean teams, with applications opening in late summer and a culture that values entrepreneurial drive.

name: Centerview Partners
recruiting_profile: One of the most selective firms on Wall Street, recruiting exclusively from top 5-10 target schools with an extremely small summer analyst class. Networking is essential, and the firm places heavy weight on prior finance internship experience and technical acumen.

name: Perella Weinberg Partners
recruiting_profile: Recruits selectively from top target schools with a small summer analyst class focused on M&A and restructuring advisory. Applications open in August, and the firm values candidates with strong technical skills and a demonstrated interest in complex advisory work.

name: PJT Partners
recruiting_profile: Highly selective recruiting from top target schools with particular strength in restructuring and special situations advisory. Summer analyst program is small with high conversion rates to full-time, and applications typically open in August.

name: Guggenheim Partners
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools for a selective summer analyst program spanning investment banking and asset management. Applications open in late summer, and the firm is known for a more entrepreneurial culture with significant responsibility given to junior bankers.

name: Qatalyst Partners
recruiting_profile: Ultra-selective technology-focused advisory boutique with one of the smallest summer analyst classes on the Street. Recruits almost exclusively from top 5 target schools, with a strong preference for candidates with demonstrated interest in technology M&A.

name: Houlihan Lokey
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a broad mix of target and semi-target schools with a larger summer analyst class than most boutiques. Known as the top restructuring bank globally, applications open in August and the firm is more accessible to non-target school candidates than elite boutiques.

name: William Blair
recruiting_profile: Strong Midwest recruiting presence, pulling from target and semi-target schools across the region. Summer analyst program offers exposure across IB, equity research, and asset management, with applications opening in August and a collaborative, less hierarchical culture.

name: Baird
recruiting_profile: Recruits heavily from Midwest target and semi-target schools with a well-regarded summer analyst program known for strong culture and work-life balance. Applications open in August, and the firm is consistently ranked as one of the best places to work in finance.

name: Jefferies
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a wide range of target and semi-target schools with a growing summer analyst program across IB, S&T, and equity research. Applications open in August, and the firm has been expanding aggressively, offering more seats than traditional middle-market peers.

name: Piper Sandler
recruiting_profile: Recruits from Midwest and national target/semi-target schools with a focused summer analyst program in investment banking and equity research. Applications open in August, and the firm is well-known for strength in healthcare and financial services verticals.

name: Raymond James
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a mix of target, semi-target, and Southeast regional schools with a growing summer analyst program. Applications open in August, and the firm is known for a supportive culture and strong deal flow in middle-market M&A.

name: Harris Williams
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a targeted set of East Coast and national semi-target schools for a focused summer analyst program in middle-market M&A. Applications open in August, and the firm is valued for high-quality deal experience and a tight-knit analyst class culture.

name: Lincoln International
recruiting_profile: Recruits from Midwest and national target/semi-target schools with a structured summer analyst program in middle-market advisory. Applications open in late summer, and the firm is known for strong private equity relationships and a collaborative working environment.

name: Citadel
recruiting_profile: Recruits top quantitative talent from elite universities with strong STEM programs, running a highly competitive summer internship across trading, quant research, and engineering. Applications open in late summer with multiple rounds of technical interviews including probability, statistics, and coding challenges.

name: Two Sigma
recruiting_profile: Recruits heavily from top computer science, math, and engineering programs at elite universities for quantitative research and engineering internships. The interview process is highly technical with coding challenges, math puzzles, and research presentations, with applications opening in August.

name: Jane Street
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top STEM programs with an intense focus on mathematical reasoning, probability, and problem-solving. Summer internships are highly sought after with a notoriously rigorous multi-round interview process featuring mental math, trading games, and logic puzzles, with applications opening in late summer.

name: AQR Capital Management
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top quantitative and economics programs for summer analyst roles in research, portfolio management, and engineering. Applications open in August, and the interview process emphasizes statistical reasoning, financial theory, and programming ability with a focus on systematic investing.

name: Deutsche Bank
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools in the US and Europe with a structured summer analyst program across IB and S&T. Applications open in August, with HireVue interviews and a Superday process similar to other bulge brackets.

name: UBS
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools globally with strong summer analyst programs in IB and wealth management. Applications open in August, and the firm is known for its global mobility and Swiss banking heritage.

name: Barclays
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a broad set of US and UK target schools with summer analyst programs across IB and markets. Applications open in August with online assessments, video interviews, and assessment center Superdays.

name: HSBC
recruiting_profile: Recruits globally from target and semi-target schools with summer analyst programs in IB and global banking. Applications open in August, and the firm is more accessible than other BBs with a strong Asia-Pacific presence.

name: Greenhill & Co
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools for a lean summer analyst class focused on M&A advisory. Applications open in August, and the firm is known for a pure advisory model with no underwriting or trading operations.

name: Rothschild & Co
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools in the US and Europe with a global advisory summer analyst program. Applications open in late summer, and the firm emphasizes cross-border M&A expertise and its centuries-old institutional reputation.

name: Blackstone
recruiting_profile: One of the most selective buy-side internship programs, recruiting almost exclusively from top target schools and prior IB analyst experience. Applications open in late summer with multiple rounds of technical and behavioral interviews focusing on LBO modeling and deal judgment.

name: KKR
recruiting_profile: Highly selective PE internship recruiting from top target schools, often requiring prior banking or consulting internship experience. Interview process focuses heavily on LBO modeling, deal case studies, and investment judgment.

name: Apollo Global Management
recruiting_profile: Recruits selectively from top target schools for summer analyst roles across PE, credit, and real assets. Known for a rigorous interview process with heavy emphasis on credit analysis and distressed investing knowledge.

name: Carlyle Group
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools for a selective summer analyst program across multiple PE verticals. Applications open in late summer, with interviews focusing on LBO modeling, industry knowledge, and investment thesis development.

name: Bain Capital
recruiting_profile: Highly selective PE recruiting from top target schools with a preference for candidates with consulting or banking backgrounds. Interview process includes case studies, LBO modeling, and portfolio company analysis.

name: Silver Lake
recruiting_profile: Ultra-selective technology-focused PE firm recruiting from top target schools for a very small summer analyst class. Strong preference for candidates with technology sector knowledge and prior IB or consulting experience.

name: Warburg Pincus
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools for a selective growth equity summer analyst program. Known for a longer-duration investment approach, with interviews focusing on growth investing frameworks and company evaluation.

name: TPG
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools for a selective summer analyst program across PE, growth, and impact investing. Interview process emphasizes LBO modeling, sector expertise, and fit with the firm's collaborative culture.

name: Thoma Bravo
recruiting_profile: Leading software-focused PE firm recruiting from top target schools for a small summer analyst class. Interviews emphasize software business model analysis, recurring revenue metrics, and LBO modeling with a technology lens.

name: Vista Equity Partners
recruiting_profile: Enterprise software-focused PE firm recruiting from top target schools for a selective summer analyst program. Known for operational value creation approach, with interviews focusing on software metrics, LBO modeling, and operational improvement frameworks.

name: D.E. Shaw
recruiting_profile: Recruits top quantitative talent from elite STEM programs for summer internships in systematic trading and quantitative research. Interview process is highly technical with probability puzzles, coding challenges, and mathematical reasoning tests.

name: Renaissance Technologies
recruiting_profile: The most secretive and selective quant fund, recruiting almost exclusively PhDs and exceptional undergraduates from top math, physics, and CS programs. Extremely small class with a multi-round technical interview process focused on original research and mathematical problem-solving.

name: Millennium Management
recruiting_profile: Multi-strategy hedge fund recruiting from top quantitative programs for summer analyst roles across discretionary and systematic strategies. Interview process includes technical assessments, market knowledge tests, and portfolio construction exercises.

name: Point72
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools for the Point72 Academy and summer analyst programs in fundamental L/S equity and systematic strategies. Known for its analyst development program, with interviews focusing on stock pitches, market knowledge, and quantitative reasoning.

name: BlackRock
recruiting_profile: The world's largest asset manager, recruiting from a broad set of target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs across portfolio management, risk, and Aladdin technology. Applications open in August with a multi-step process including HireVue and case-based interviews.

name: Vanguard
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a wide range of schools including semi-targets and non-targets for summer internships across investment management, financial planning, and operations. Known for a collaborative, client-first culture with a less competitive recruiting process than Wall Street peers.

name: Fidelity Investments
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a broad set of schools for summer analyst programs in equity research, fixed income, and asset management. Applications open in August, and the firm is known for giving interns real research responsibilities and a strong mentorship culture.

name: T. Rowe Price
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in equity and fixed income research. Known for a rigorous fundamental research culture, with interviews focusing on stock pitches and investment analysis.

name: Wellington Management
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools for a selective summer analyst program in investment management and research. Known for a partnership structure and long-term investment approach, with interviews emphasizing analytical thinking and market knowledge.

name: PIMCO
recruiting_profile: Recruits from top target schools for a selective summer analyst program focused on fixed income and macro investing. Interview process is rigorous with emphasis on macroeconomic analysis, bond math, and portfolio construction.

name: BMO Capital Markets
recruiting_profile: Recruits from US and Canadian target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and capital markets. Applications open in August, and the firm offers strong deal flow in the middle market with good exposure to cross-border transactions.

name: RBC Capital Markets
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a broad range of US and Canadian schools for summer analyst programs across IB and markets. Applications open in August, and the firm is one of the largest Canadian banks with a growing US presence and strong energy and mining practices.

name: TD Securities
recruiting_profile: Recruits from US and Canadian target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and markets. Known for a supportive culture and strong fixed income franchise, with applications opening in August.

name: CIBC Capital Markets
recruiting_profile: Recruits from US and Canadian target schools for a summer analyst program focused on M&A and capital markets advisory. Applications open in August, and the firm is known for strong Canadian market presence and growing US operations.

name: Scotiabank Global Banking
recruiting_profile: Recruits from US and Canadian schools for summer analyst programs in IB and global markets. Known for strong Latin American and emerging markets expertise, with applications opening in August.

name: Stifel
recruiting_profile: Recruits from Midwest and national semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and equity research. Applications open in August, and the firm has grown significantly through acquisitions with strong middle-market deal flow.

name: Oppenheimer
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a mix of target and semi-target schools for summer analyst positions in IB and wealth management. Known for a lean team structure that gives analysts significant responsibility, with applications opening in late summer.

name: KeyBanc Capital Markets
recruiting_profile: Recruits from Midwest semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in middle-market IB and capital markets. Known for strong relationships with middle-market companies and a collaborative culture, with applications opening in August.

name: TD Cowen
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and equity research, with particular strength in healthcare and technology sectors. Applications open in August with a focus on sector knowledge and analytical skills.

name: Nomura
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools globally for summer analyst programs across IB and markets. Known for strong Asia-Pacific connectivity, with applications opening in August and a multi-round interview process.

name: Mizuho
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and debt capital markets. Growing US presence with strong Japanese corporate client relationships, with applications opening in August.

name: BNP Paribas
recruiting_profile: Recruits from US and European target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and global markets. One of the largest European banks with strong fixed income and derivatives franchises, with applications opening in August.

name: Societe Generale
recruiting_profile: Recruits from US and European target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and markets. Known for strong structured products and derivatives expertise, with applications opening in August.

name: Credit Agricole
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and capital markets. Strong European franchise with growing US presence, with applications opening in August and a focus on structured finance.

name: Macquarie
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB, infrastructure, and commodities. Known for strong infrastructure advisory and a global platform, with applications opening in August.

name: FT Partners
recruiting_profile: The leading fintech-focused advisory boutique recruiting from target and semi-target schools for a small summer analyst class. Interviews emphasize fintech industry knowledge and M&A technical skills, with applications opening in late summer.

name: LionTree
recruiting_profile: Ultra-selective TMT advisory boutique recruiting from top target schools for a very small summer analyst class. Known for advising on landmark media and telecom deals, with interviews emphasizing TMT sector knowledge and deal judgment.

name: Allen & Company
recruiting_profile: Highly exclusive TMT advisory firm known for hosting the annual Sun Valley conference. Recruiting is extremely selective from top target schools, with a tiny analyst class and heavy emphasis on relationships and media industry knowledge.

name: Ducera Partners
recruiting_profile: Restructuring-focused advisory boutique recruiting from target schools for a small summer analyst class. Founded by former Lazard professionals, with interviews emphasizing restructuring concepts, credit analysis, and financial modeling.

name: Greentech Capital Advisors
recruiting_profile: Clean energy and sustainability-focused advisory boutique recruiting from target and semi-target schools. Small summer analyst class with interviews emphasizing knowledge of energy transition, renewables, and ESG-related M&A.

name: Leerink Partners
recruiting_profile: Leading healthcare-focused investment bank recruiting from target and semi-target schools for a small summer analyst class. Interviews emphasize healthcare industry knowledge, biotech valuation, and sector-specific financial modeling.

name: Canaccord Genuity
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools in the US and Canada for summer analyst programs in IB and capital markets. Known for mid-market deal flow with strength in technology and healthcare sectors.

name: Ladenburg Thalmann
recruiting_profile: Recruits from Southeast and national semi-target schools for summer analyst positions in IB and wealth management. Smaller analyst class with good deal exposure for interns, with applications opening in late summer.

name: Stephens Inc
recruiting_profile: Recruits from Southeast and national semi-target schools for a summer analyst program in middle-market IB. Family-owned firm with strong deal flow in consumer, healthcare, and industrials, with applications opening in August.

name: D.A. Davidson
recruiting_profile: Recruits from national and regional semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and equity research. Known for strong middle-market presence in the Western US, with applications opening in August.

name: Truist Securities
recruiting_profile: Recruits from Southeast target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and capital markets. Growing IB platform after the BB&T-SunTrust merger, with applications opening in August.

name: Wells Fargo Securities
recruiting_profile: Recruits from a broad set of target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and capital markets. Growing investment banking platform with strong commercial banking relationships feeding deal flow, with applications opening in August.

name: MUFG Securities
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and capital markets. Japanese parent bank provides strong corporate client relationships, with applications opening in August and a growing US presence.

name: Solomon Partners
recruiting_profile: TMT-focused advisory boutique recruiting from target and semi-target schools for a small summer analyst class. Known for deep expertise in media, entertainment, and technology transactions, with applications opening in late summer.

name: Bridgewater Associates
recruiting_profile: The world's largest hedge fund recruits from top target schools for a unique summer associate program emphasizing radical transparency and systematic macro investing. Interview process is culture-heavy with case studies on economic principles and original thinking.

name: Citadel Securities
recruiting_profile: Leading market maker recruiting top quantitative and engineering talent from elite STEM programs. Interview process is highly technical with probability, statistics, and coding challenges, distinct from Citadel's hedge fund recruiting.

name: Baupost Group
recruiting_profile: Ultra-selective value investing hedge fund with a very small summer analyst class recruited from top target schools. Known for Seth Klarman's deep value approach, with interviews emphasizing fundamental analysis, contrarian thinking, and investment judgment.

name: Elliott Management
recruiting_profile: Leading activist hedge fund recruiting from top target schools for a small summer analyst program. Known for aggressive activism campaigns, with interviews focusing on event-driven investing, corporate governance analysis, and financial modeling.

name: Tiger Global Management
recruiting_profile: Prominent technology-focused crossover fund with an extremely selective recruiting process from top target schools. Known for rapid-fire growth investing, with interviews emphasizing tech sector knowledge, growth metrics analysis, and investment judgment.

name: Ares Management
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs across credit, PE, and real estate. One of the largest alternative asset managers, with interviews focusing on credit analysis, LBO modeling, and portfolio construction.

name: Oaktree Capital
recruiting_profile: Leading distressed debt investor recruiting from target and semi-target schools for a selective summer analyst program. Known for Howard Marks' investment philosophy, with interviews emphasizing credit analysis, distressed situations, and risk assessment.

name: Man Group
recruiting_profile: One of the world's largest publicly traded hedge funds recruiting from top quantitative programs for summer analyst roles in systematic trading and machine learning research. Interview process is technical with emphasis on statistics, programming, and quantitative reasoning.

name: Balyasny Asset Management
recruiting_profile: Multi-strategy hedge fund recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst programs across fundamental equity, macro, and quantitative strategies. Known for a pod-based structure, with interviews focusing on market knowledge and analytical skills.

name: General Atlantic
recruiting_profile: Leading growth equity firm recruiting from top target schools for a selective summer analyst program. Known for later-stage growth investments across technology, healthcare, and financial services, with interviews focusing on growth investing frameworks and company evaluation.

name: Insight Partners
recruiting_profile: Software-focused growth equity firm recruiting from top target schools for a small summer analyst class. Known for a data-driven investment approach, with interviews emphasizing SaaS metrics, software business models, and growth equity valuation.

name: TA Associates
recruiting_profile: Growth-focused PE firm recruiting from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs. One of the oldest growth equity firms with strong deal flow in technology, healthcare, and financial services, with applications opening in late summer.

name: Summit Partners
recruiting_profile: Growth equity firm recruiting from target and semi-target schools for a summer analyst program focused on growth-stage investments. Known for a collaborative culture and cross-sector deal flow, with applications opening in late summer.

name: Francisco Partners
recruiting_profile: Technology-focused PE firm recruiting from top target schools for a selective summer analyst class. Known for complex technology buyouts and carve-outs, with interviews emphasizing technology sector knowledge, LBO modeling, and deal structuring.

name: Cowen Healthcare
recruiting_profile: Healthcare-focused investment bank recruiting from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in healthcare IB and equity research. Strong in biotech and medtech advisory, with applications opening in August.

name: Guggenheim Securities
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB advisory and capital markets. Known for growing deal flow and a strong senior banker network, with applications opening in August.

name: Lazard Freres
recruiting_profile: The advisory arm of Lazard recruiting selectively from top target schools for summer analyst positions in M&A and restructuring advisory. Known for its French banking heritage and global advisory capabilities.

name: Rothschild North America
recruiting_profile: North American advisory arm recruiting from top target schools for a selective summer analyst class focused on cross-border M&A. Strong European connectivity and a reputation for discreet, high-profile transactions.

name: Duff & Phelps
recruiting_profile: Recruits from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in valuation advisory, restructuring, and transaction opinions. Known as a leading independent valuation firm, with applications opening in late summer.

name: Greenhill Advisors
recruiting_profile: Pure advisory boutique recruiting from target schools for a small analyst class focused on global M&A. Known for senior banker involvement and lean deal teams, with applications opening in August.

name: Citadel Global Equities
recruiting_profile: The fundamental equity arm of Citadel recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst programs in long/short equity research. Interviews focus on stock pitches, financial modeling, and sector-specific knowledge.

name: Sculptor Capital
recruiting_profile: Multi-strategy hedge fund recruiting from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs across credit, equity, and real estate. Known for a diversified investment platform, with applications opening in late summer.

name: Pershing Square Capital
recruiting_profile: Bill Ackman's concentrated activist fund with an extremely selective recruiting process from top target schools. Very small analyst class with interviews focused on deep fundamental analysis, activist thesis development, and investment conviction.

name: Third Point
recruiting_profile: Activist hedge fund recruiting from top target schools for a small summer analyst program. Known for Dan Loeb's event-driven approach, with interviews emphasizing catalyst identification, corporate governance analysis, and financial modeling.

name: Viking Global Investors
recruiting_profile: Tiger cub hedge fund recruiting from top target schools for a selective summer analyst program in fundamental long/short equity. Known for deep sector research, with interviews focusing on stock pitches and investment judgment.

name: Lone Pine Capital
recruiting_profile: Tiger cub long/short equity fund recruiting from top target schools for a very small summer analyst class. Known for concentrated positions and deep fundamental research, with interviews focused on stock pitches and analytical rigor.

name: Coatue Management
recruiting_profile: Technology-focused crossover fund recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst programs in public equity and venture/growth investments. Known for data-driven tech investing, with interviews emphasizing technology sector analysis.

name: Marshall Wace
recruiting_profile: Systematic and fundamental equity hedge fund recruiting from top programs for summer analyst roles. Known for its TOPS platform that crowdsources trade ideas, with interviews focusing on quantitative skills and investment analysis.

name: Schonfeld Strategic Advisors
recruiting_profile: Multi-strategy hedge fund recruiting from target schools for summer analyst programs across fundamental equity, quantitative, and macro strategies. Pod-based structure offering significant responsibility to junior team members.

name: ExodusPoint Capital
recruiting_profile: Multi-strategy hedge fund recruiting from top quantitative and target business programs for summer analyst roles. Known for systematic and discretionary strategies, with a technical interview process emphasizing quantitative reasoning.

name: Hellman & Friedman
recruiting_profile: Highly selective PE firm recruiting from top target schools for a very small summer analyst class. Known for large-cap buyouts in software, financial services, and healthcare, with interviews emphasizing LBO modeling and sector expertise.

name: Advent International
recruiting_profile: Global PE firm recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst programs with strong international deal flow. Known for cross-border buyouts and sector specialization, with interviews focusing on LBO modeling and international business knowledge.

name: Permira
recruiting_profile: European-origin PE firm with growing US presence recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst roles. Known for technology, consumer, and healthcare buyouts, with interviews emphasizing LBO modeling and sector-specific due diligence.

name: Apax Partners
recruiting_profile: Global PE firm recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst positions across technology, healthcare, and services buyouts. Known for its operating partner model, with interviews emphasizing LBO modeling and operational improvement analysis.

name: Leonard Green & Partners
recruiting_profile: Consumer and services-focused PE firm recruiting from top target schools for a small summer analyst class. Known for retail and consumer buyouts, with interviews focusing on consumer sector analysis and LBO modeling.

name: Clayton Dubilier & Rice
recruiting_profile: Operations-focused PE firm recruiting from top target schools for a selective summer analyst program. One of the oldest PE firms, known for operational value creation in industrial and healthcare companies.

name: Welsh Carson Anderson & Stowe
recruiting_profile: Healthcare and technology-focused PE firm recruiting from top target schools for a small summer analyst class. Known for sector-specialized buyouts and long hold periods, with interviews emphasizing healthcare or tech sector knowledge.

name: GTCR
recruiting_profile: Chicago-based PE firm recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst programs. Known for the Leaders Strategy approach to PE investing, with interviews focusing on LBO modeling, management assessment, and sector expertise.

name: Madison Dearborn Partners
recruiting_profile: Leading Chicago-based PE firm recruiting from top target and Midwest semi-target schools for a summer analyst program. Known for TMT, healthcare, and financial services buyouts, with interviews emphasizing LBO modeling and deal judgment.

name: Veritas Capital
recruiting_profile: Government services and technology-focused PE firm recruiting from top target schools for a small summer analyst class. Known for defense and healthcare IT buyouts, with interviews emphasizing sector knowledge and LBO modeling.

name: Moelis Australia
recruiting_profile: Australian advisory arm of Moelis recruiting from top Australian and international universities for summer analyst programs in M&A and restructuring advisory across the Asia-Pacific region.

name: Wedbush Securities
recruiting_profile: West Coast-focused investment bank recruiting from national and regional semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and equity research. Known for technology sector coverage, with applications opening in late summer.

name: Craig-Hallum Capital Group
recruiting_profile: Midwest-based investment bank recruiting from regional and national semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and equity research. Known for growth company advisory and strong Midwest presence.

name: Maxim Group
recruiting_profile: NYC-based investment bank recruiting from semi-target and non-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and equity research. More accessible recruiting process, with applications opening in late summer.

name: B. Riley Financial
recruiting_profile: West Coast investment bank recruiting from national semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB, equity research, and capital markets. Growing platform through acquisitions with strong middle-market deal flow.

name: Janney Montgomery Scott
recruiting_profile: Philadelphia-based investment bank recruiting from Mid-Atlantic semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in IB and wealth management. Strong regional presence with good middle-market deal flow.

name: Sandler ONeill (now Piper Sandler)
recruiting_profile: Financial services-focused IB now part of Piper Sandler, recruiting from target and semi-target schools. Known as the leading bank advisory franchise, with applications through the Piper Sandler platform.

name: Keefe Bruyette & Woods
recruiting_profile: Financial institutions-focused boutique recruiting from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in bank M&A and equity research. Known as the top FIG advisory franchise, with interviews emphasizing financial services sector knowledge.

name: Lazard Asset Management
recruiting_profile: The asset management arm of Lazard recruiting from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in equity and fixed income research. Known for fundamental active management with a global research platform.

name: Neuberger Berman
recruiting_profile: Independent asset manager recruiting from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in equities, fixed income, and alternatives. Employee-owned firm known for a collaborative culture and long-term investment approach.

name: AllianceBernstein
recruiting_profile: Global asset manager recently relocated to Nashville, recruiting from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in research and portfolio management. Known for fundamental equity research and a blend of active and systematic strategies.

name: Invesco
recruiting_profile: Global asset manager recruiting from a broad set of schools for summer analyst programs in investment management and distribution. One of the largest independent investment managers, with applications opening in August.

name: Nuveen
recruiting_profile: TIAA's asset management arm recruiting from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in fixed income, real estate, and responsible investing. Known for ESG integration and real assets expertise.

name: Prudential Financial
recruiting_profile: Major financial services firm recruiting from a broad set of schools for summer analyst programs in investment management, insurance, and retirement. Known for a comprehensive internship program with multiple rotational tracks.

name: State Street Global Advisors
recruiting_profile: One of the world's largest asset managers recruiting from target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs in index, active, and ETF management. Creator of the SPDR ETF franchise, with applications opening in August.

name: Northern Trust
recruiting_profile: Wealth management and asset servicing firm recruiting from Midwest target and semi-target schools for summer analyst programs. Known for ultra-high-net-worth wealth management and institutional asset servicing.

name: BNY Mellon
recruiting_profile: One of the world's largest custodian banks recruiting from a broad set of schools for summer analyst programs in asset servicing, investment management, and markets. Applications open in August with a structured internship program.

name: CVC Capital Partners
recruiting_profile: One of the world's largest PE firms by AUM recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst programs. European-origin firm with growing US presence, known for large-cap buyouts across industrials, consumer, and TMT.

name: EQT Partners
recruiting_profile: Nordic-origin PE firm recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst roles. Known for its thematic investment approach and purpose-driven investing philosophy, with interviews focusing on LBO modeling and sector expertise.

name: Cinven
recruiting_profile: European PE firm with selective US recruiting from top target schools for summer analyst positions. Known for healthcare, TMT, and financial services buyouts, with interviews emphasizing LBO modeling and European market knowledge.

name: Platinum Equity
